hero.headline: Master your Elo.

services.label: SERVICES
services.title: Everything you need to improve

coaching.title: AI Coach
coaching.desc: Specialized AI agents you can interact with that perform a complete analysis of your game. Economy, positioning, and mechanics — personalized round-by-round feedback.

interactiveMap.title: Interactive Map
interactiveMap.desc: Interactive map for every CS2 map showing duels, thrown grenades, and heatmaps with detailed insights. Visualize every play from a new perspective.

stats.title: Detailed Statistics
stats.desc: Detailed match statistics and comprehensive personal stats breakdown. KDA, spray patterns, economy, and much more in a complete dashboard.

challenges.title: Challenges & Ranking
challenges.desc: Challenges to improve and rewards for completing them. Compete in the player ranking and level up with personalized monthly challenges.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: From your match to improvement in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Login with your Steam account. We detect your matches automatically every 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: 3 specialized agents analyze economy, positioning, and mechanics from each demo.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive personalized coaching every match. Track your progress and complete monthly challenges.

aiDemo.subtitle: Observe this real play while the AI detects tactical errors

monthlyChallenges.title: Monthly Challenges

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale when you need to.

items.q: How does the AI Coach work?
items.a: Our specialized AI agents automatically analyze every aspect of your game: economy, positioning, and mechanics. You receive personalized round-by-round feedback that you can query interactively.
Currently StratAI supports Counter-Strike 2 (CS2). We analyze competitive and premier match demos with 128-tick precision.

items.q: Is it safe to connect my Steam account?
items.a: Absolutely. We use Steam's official OAuth system for authentication. We only access public profile data and your demos. We never have access to your password or credentials.

items.q: How long does demo analysis take?
items.a: Less than 10 seconds per match. Our high-performance Go parsing service processes each demo automatically as soon as it's detected.

items.q: Can I use the platform for free?
items.a: Yes. The Free plan includes 5 demos per month, basic AI Coach access, interactive map, stats for the last 10 matches, and monthly challenges — all at no cost.

Each month, personalized challenges are generated based on your areas of improvement. Completing them unlocks achievements and moves you up in the global ranking. It's a gamification system to keep you motivated.

items.q: What does the interactive map show?
items.a: The interactive map represents each CS2 map with data from your matches: positions of won and lost duels, grenade trajectories, movement heatmaps, and tactical insights by zone.

cta.title: Ready to stop guessing?
cta.subtitle: Connect Steam and let the AI do the work. Your first match is analyzed in under 10 seconds.
